title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS804-4DDQ-hRM
description: The MikroTik CRS804 DDQ is a reliable and compact 400G Cloud Router Switch designed to interconnect network devices with very high throughput demands, such as in AI and GPU clusters . It is equipped with (4) 40G/50G/100G/200G/400G QSFP-DD ports , (2) 1G/2.5G/5G/10G ports and (1) console port. The QSFP-DD ports support breakout mode , allowing the bandwidth to be split into 1G/2.5G/5G/10G/25G/50G speeds To ensure high availability, the device features (2) redundant hot-swap power supplies and (2) hot-swap cooling fans . In the event of a power supply or fan failure, the faulty module can be replaced without shutting down the switch. The unit is powered by a high-performance quad-core processor and is equipped with 4GB of RAM Device (2) Power cords Rack mounting kit (2) RMK-2x10/19
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (2) 100M/1G/2.5G/5G/10Gbps Gigabit LAN Yes Management LAN Yes Optical interfaces (4) 40G/50G/100G/200G/400G Serial port RJ45 Power Power type Mains power (230V) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 123 Physical characteristics Design Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 10 up to 60 Hardware CPU AL52400 CPU frequency [MHz] 2000 CPU cores 4 Internal storage [MB] 512 RAM [MB] 4096
